business_hours.notes: Limited Saturday hours from May to September: 08:00 to 12:00

office_address: 901 S Mill Avenue, Suite 110, Tempe, Arizona 85281
emergency_definition: Complete cooling failure in an occupied commercial building
Walk-in cooler or freezer failure at a food service location
Boiler failure in winter when the building is occupied

non_emergency_routing_rules.message_to_caller: We'll respond next business day. If it's Saturday during our summer hours, someone might call back same day.

call_transfer_rules.pre_transfer_message: Short and professional. That's what I want.
call_transfer_rules.transfer_fail_message: I was unable to reach our on-call team directly. I've sent them your information and someone will call you within 20 minutes. Please stay near your phone.

integration_constraints: Don't create work orders from calls
Don't tell customers what parts cost — we quote after diagnosis
after_hours_flow_summary: Collect name, number, company name, and brief description. Tell them we'll respond next business day. If it's Saturday during our summer hours, someone might call back same day.
office_hours_flow_summary: Standard: Monday through Friday, 7am to 5pm Mountain time. And May 1 through September 30, we also do Saturdays 8am to noon, Mountain time.
notes: Pinnacle Hotels have a separate priority line.
